name: machine-pin
description: GPIO pin control: input, output, open-drain, interrupts, pull-up/down. The fundamental hardware I/O class on ESP32.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific. Pin numbers are GPIO numbers (not board physical pin numbers).

classes.name: Pin
classes.signature: machine.Pin(id, mode=-1, pull=-1, *, value=None, drive=0, alt=-1)

constructor_params.name: id
constructor_params.description: GPIO number (0-39 on ESP32) or string like 'P0'. Required.

constructor_params.name: mode
constructor_params.description: Pin mode: Pin.IN(1), Pin.OUT(3), Pin.OPEN_DRAIN(7). Default: Pin.IN.

constructor_params.name: pull
constructor_params.description: Pull resistor: Pin.PULL_UP(2), Pin.PULL_DOWN(1), None(0). Default: None.

constructor_params.name: value
constructor_params.description: Initial output value for Pin.OUT mode. 0 or 1.

constructor_params.name: alt
constructor_params.description: Alternate function number. ESP32-specific. Not available on all firmware builds.

methods.name: Pin.init
methods.description: Re-initialize pin. Parameters same as constructor.

methods.name: Pin.value
methods.description: Get or set pin value. Without argument: returns 0 or 1. With argument: sets output and returns None.

methods.name: Pin.irq
methods.description: Set interrupt handler. handler receives 1 arg (the Pin). trigger: Pin.IRQ_RISING, Pin.IRQ_FALLING, or both OR'd. hard=True for hard interrupt (runs immediately). wake keyword for ESP32 deep-sleep wake.
methods.callback_signature_warning: IRQ handler signature is `def handler(pin):` where `pin` is the Pin object. NOT `def handler():` with no args.

methods.name: Pin.toggle
methods.description: Toggle pin output value. ESP32-specific method.

classes.example:
from machine import Pin
led = Pin(2, Pin.OUT)
led.on()
btn = Pin(0, Pin.IN, Pin.PULL_UP)
if btn.value() == 0:
    print('pressed')

esp32_notes: GPIO 34-39 are input-only (no pull-up/down on some boards).
GPIO 1 and 3 are usually UART0 TX/RX (USB serial).
GPIO 6-11 are connected to internal flash, do NOT use.
Pin.board is a class attribute that provides board-specific pin mappings.
